title: juncus baekdusanensis
intro: Juncus baekdusanensis is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, commonly known as the Baekdu Mountain Rush. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Korean Peninsula and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Juncus baekdusanensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal preparations.
